functions.name: cbdep.zipfile_with_permissions._unpack_zipfile_with_permissions
documentation: Unpack zip `filename` to `extract_dir`

functions.name: cbdep.zipfile_with_permissions.register
documentation: Configures shutil.unpack_archive to use our custom unzipper

classes.name: cbdep.zipfile_with_permissions.ZipFileWithPermissions
documentation: Custom ZipFile class handling file permissions.

modules.name: cbdep.cache
documentation: Cache

classes.name: cbdep.cache.Cache

methods.name: cbdep.cache.Cache.__init__
documentation: Initialize a cache based at the specified directory

methods.name: cbdep.cache.Cache.get
documentation:
Downloads url (if necessary), saves in local cache. If recache is
True, will always re-download the url.

methods.name: cbdep.cache.Cache.put
documentation:
Copies the specified local pathlib handle into the cache keyed by the
specified URL.
Returns pathlib handle to cached file.

methods.name: cbdep.cache.Cache.report
documentation: Output the full path to the file in the cache

methods.name: cbdep.cache.Cache.save
documentation: Save a local copy of a file in the cache

methods.name: cbdep.cache.Cache._cachedir
documentation:
Returns pathlib handle to cache directory for given URL. Creates cachedir
if necessary, with initial "url" file entry.

methods.name: cbdep.cache.Cache._writefilename
documentation:
Writes the "filename" file into the appropriate cache directory. As a
side effect, if "filename" already exists and references a different
file, that (now stale) file will be removed.

methods.name: cbdep.cache.Cache._cachefilename
documentation: Returns pathlib handle to the "filename" file in cachedir

Class to store downloaded files in a local cache, keyed by URL.

Local cache directory structure is keyed on an MD5 checksum of the
URL, and contains directories named:
    <first 2 chars of checksum> / <checksum> /
In each directory will be three files:
    url - contains the input URL
    filename - contains the filename associated with the download
    [filename] - contains the downloaded contents

modules.name: cbdep.platform_introspection
documentation: Functions for determining current platform information

functions.name: cbdep.platform_introspection.override_platforms
documentation: Set platform to a specific value or values, to suppress introspection

functions.name: cbdep.platform_introspection.override_arch
documentation:
Set initial architecture to specific value - additional synonyms may
still be added

functions.name: cbdep.platform_introspection.get_platforms
documentation:
Returns a list of increasingly-generic identifiers for the current
system.

functions.name: cbdep.platform_introspection._alpine_mod
documentation:
If this is Alpine Linux, append "musl" and "alpine" to each arch
entry in arches. This appears to be a common convention (at least
nodejs, dotnet, and Bellsoft OpenJDK use it).

functions.name: cbdep.platform_introspection.get_arches
documentation: Returns a list of possible architectures based on the current system

functions.name: cbdep.platform_introspection.get_default_arches
documentation:
Returns a platform-dependent value suitable for if_arch directives.
Important: this is a list of arch names most frequently used in *package*
filenames for a given OS. It should *not* contain any "synonyms", like
"arm64" and "aarch64", or "x86_64" and "amd64", because given the way
if_arch works, only the first will ever get matched. Basically these
should contain just the most common name (if any) for "32-bit Intel",
"64-bit Intel", "64-bit ARM", and any other supported arches on each OS.

documentation: Dependency Management System

methods.name: cbdep.cli.Cbdep.do_cache
documentation: Cache a URL

methods.name: cbdep.cli.Cbdep.do_platform
documentation: Display introspected platform information

methods.name: cbdep.cli.Cbdep.loadconfig
documentation: Returns the contents of the config file defining the available packages

methods.name: cbdep.cli.Cbdep.do_install
documentation: Install a package based on a descriptor YAML

methods.name: cbdep.cli.Cbdep.do_list
documentation: List available packages

modules.name: cbdep.install
documentation: Install

classes.name: cbdep.install.Installer

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.__init__
documentation:
Base constructor for class. "config" is a YAML object,
"cache" is the cache directory, "platforms" is a list of
platform names; "arches" is a list of architecture names.

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.__del__
documentation: Clean up

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.fromYaml
documentation: Constructor from a YAML configuration file

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.copy
documentation:
Creates a new Installer object with the same configuration
as this Installer. Necessary to call a nested install().

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.set_cache_only
documentation:
If set to true, then calling install() will only execute any
'url' directives in the corresponding package

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.set_recache
documentation:
If set to true, then calling install() will ignore any previously-
cached installer files and re-download them (and add the new files
to the cache, replacing old ones)

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.set_from_local_file
documentation:
If a filename is specified here, "cbdep install" will cache and use
that file rather than downloading anything from the internet. Disables
recaching.

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.get_installer_file
documentation:
Returns the (most recent) installer_file, ie, the resulting
local filename of the most recent 'url' directive

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.install
documentation: Entry point to install a version of named package

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.find_block
documentation:
Searches for first block (dictionary) in the list "blocks" which
is appropriate for the current system, based on its if_platform,
if_version, etc. keys
Returns: Said block, or None if none match

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer._match_system
documentation: Common implementation for if_platform and if_arch.

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.match_platform
documentation:
If the block contains an if_platform key, return true if the current
platform is one of the values for that key, else false.
If the block does not contain an if_platform key, return true

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.match_arch
documentation:
If the block contains an if_arch key, return true if the current
architecture is one of the values for that key, else false.
If the block contains a default_arches or default_cbdeps_arches key,
behave as though if_arch existed with a platform-dependent default
set of arches.
If the block does not contain either key, return true.

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.match_version
documentation:
If the block contains an if_version key, return true if the current
version matches the value expression, else false.
If the block does not contain an if_version key, return true

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.execute_block
documentation:
Given a single block from the config, execute all actions
sequentially

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.handle_set_env
documentation: Sets values in the cbdep process's environment

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.handle_base_url
documentation: Handles a 'base_url' directive

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.handle_fixed_dir
documentation:
Handler for 'fixed_dir' option. If this references a directory that
already exists, presume this action has been completed previously.

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.scrape_html
documentation:
Reads localfile looking for a particular regexp, which is presumed
to be a valid URL; cache that URL and return the newly-downloaded file

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.do_url
documentation: Handles a 'url' directive

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.do_install_dir
documentation: Handles an 'install_dir' directive, which resets self.installdir

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.do_unarchive
documentation: Unarchives the downloaded file

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.do_cbdep
documentation: Runs a nested "cbdep install" command

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.do_run
documentation: Runs a sequence of local commands from a 'run' digrective

methods.name: cbdep.install.Installer.templatize
documentation: Utility function for doing template substitution

Manages caching installation files and unpacking them based on an
installation template yaml file
